Coffee Pods Settlement — Receipts Required

A class action settlement has been reached over allegations that coffee pod packaging contained misleading sustainability claims. Class members who purchased the affected pods between 2020 and 2024 may file a claim.

Deadline: 12/31/2027. Eligible class members: anyone who purchased the affected pods between 2020 and 2024.

Receipts are required to claim higher payouts. You must submit a photograph of the receipt with your claim form.
